headline: Woman's 'Quiet Quitting' Is So Quiet Her Boss Promotes Her For 'Not Causing Drama'
summary: 'She's very professional,' her boss said. 'She's very absent,' her coworkers said. 'Same thing,' her boss said.
fullBody: Amanda QuietQuit 9 months ago. She stopped attending meetings, stopped responding to emails, stopped existing. Her boss promoted her. 'She never causes drama,' her boss said. 'She's never there,' her coworkers said. 'Exactly,' her boss said. Amanda now works from 'home' (which is actually her couch). She's been promoted twice. 'I'm very productive,' Amanda said. She is not. 'It's about vibes,' her boss said.
